title: Slow Internet 网络卡顿求助
scene: 用户向网络技术人员求助

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Hi, my internet is extremely slow. I cannot even watch a video without buffering.
lines.trans: 你好，我的网络特别慢。连看视频都一直缓冲。

lines.speaker: Technician
lines.line: I understand. Are you using Wi-Fi or a wired connection right now?
lines.trans: 我了解。您现在用的是Wi-Fi还是有线连接？

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I am on Wi-Fi. My phone and laptop are both very slow.
lines.trans: 我用的是Wi-Fi。手机和笔记本电脑都很慢。

lines.speaker: Technician
lines.line: Please try restarting your router first. Unplug it for thirty seconds, then plug it back in.
lines.trans: 请先重启路由器。拔掉电源三十秒，然后再插上。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: I did that. It is still slow. My video call keeps dropping.
lines.trans: 我试过了。还是很慢。我的视频通话一直掉线。

lines.speaker: Technician
lines.line: Let me run a remote test. Your download speed is only five megabits. It should be one hundred.
lines.trans: 让我远程测试一下。您的下载速度只有5兆。应该是100兆。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: That explains it. Is there a problem with the line or the router?
lines.trans: 这就说得通了。是线路问题还是路由器问题？

lines.speaker: Technician
lines.line: It seems like a line issue in your area. A technician will visit tomorrow morning to fix it.
lines.trans: 看起来是您所在区域的线路问题。明天上午会有技术人员上门维修。

lines.speaker: User
lines.line: Will I be charged for the repair? I pay my bill on time every month.
lines.trans: 维修要收费吗？我每个月都按时缴费。

lines.speaker: Technician
lines.line: No, this is a network issue on our side. The repair is completely free.
lines.trans: 不，这是我们这边的网络故障。维修完全免费。
